## Checklist

- [ ] Uses only fake, non-proprietary data
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or production identifiers
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] ADR added or updated for architecture-impacting changes
- [ ] README navigation updated if files/modules were added
